title: HDL Cholesterol Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3ufynw

steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for HDL analysis by running a lipid calibrator, HDL Direct Reagent Reagent 1 and HDL Direct Reagent 2.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 3µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 180 µL of Direct Reagent 1. c) Add 60 µL of Direct Reagent 2. d) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes. e) Absorbance is measured at 600 nm.

substeps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus.
Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes.
